Born in the Hills
of Kigezi

Our passion fruits thrive on Kigezi's fertile terraced highlands. Rich volcanic soils and a cool mountain climate produce Uganda's most flavourful passion fruit.

Our Story

From Kigezi's Highlands
to Your Glass

ZOMA Enterprises Limited was founded with a clear mission: transform Uganda's finest passion fruits into a premium, healthy beverage that nourishes families and uplifts communities. Based in Kabale Municipality, we have spent over five years perfecting every bottle.

Faith is made from fresh passion fruits sourced directly from smallholder farmers in the Kigezi highlands, supporting local livelihoods while delivering exceptional natural taste.

🏔
Highlands SourcedFresh passion fruits from Kigezi's fertile hills, selected at peak ripeness
✅
UNBS CertifiedFully compliant with Uganda National Bureau of Standards regulations
🌿
Zero Artificial AdditivesNaturally preserved with lemon and ginger. Nothing artificial, ever
The Product

Faith Concentrated
Passion Fruit Drink

A powerfully flavoured, all-natural passion fruit concentrate. One 750 ml bottle makes up to 4.5 litres of delicious, refreshing juice.

Ingredients

Passion Fruit Juice
Sugar
Lemon Juice (Natural Preservative)
Ginger Juice (Natural Preservative)

How to Prepare

Measure ratio 1 : 5 (1 part Faith juice and 5 parts water). Add water, mix well, taste and adjust. Chill and serve. Refrigerate after opening.

Why Faith

The Power of Passion Fruit

Every bottle of Faith is packed with natural goodness straight from the fruit.

💪

Key Nutrients

Rich in vitamins A and C, potassium, and iron to power your day and support overall wellbeing.

🛡

Boosts Immunity

High antioxidant content helps your immune system fight off infections and stay strong.

🌾

High in Fibre

A good source of dietary fibre to support healthy digestion and keep you satisfied longer.

❤

Heart Health

Supports cardiovascular health with naturally occurring potassium and protective antioxidants.

📉

Low Glycemic Index

Helps improve insulin sensitivity and maintain stable blood sugar levels.

😌

Reduces Anxiety

Natural compounds in passion fruit promote relaxation and better sleep quality.

How We Make It

From Farm to Bottle

Every bottle goes through a careful, hygienic process to ensure maximum quality, freshness, and safety.

1
🍂

Selection

Fresh passion fruits, lemons, and ginger are carefully chosen and thoroughly washed.

2
🔫

Extraction

Fruits are sliced and pulp extracted. Lemon and ginger are blended as natural preservatives.

3
⚒

Filtration

Blended mixture passes through fine sieves producing smooth, pure juice.

4
🌡

Pasteurisation

Gently heated to eliminate harmful microorganisms while preserving natural flavour.

5
❄

Cooling

Rapidly cooled after pasteurisation to lock in freshness before bottling.

6
🍾

Bottling

Filled into pre-sterilised 750 ml bottles, hermetically sealed and quality checked.

Community First

Supporting Uganda's Smallholder Farmers

Behind every bottle of Faith is a farming family. We source exclusively from smallholder farmers in the highlands of Kigezi, providing a reliable market and fair prices while reducing post-harvest losses.

🌿Reducing post-harvest losses for local farmers
💰Providing stable, competitive incomes for growers
📚Training farmers in improved harvesting techniques
🌎Connecting Kigezi produce to national and global markets
Get in Touch

Order Faith Today

We supply wholesale to supermarkets, retailers, restaurants, hotels, and distributors across Uganda. Reach out to discuss pricing and availability.
